common.footer_disclaimer: AFTRAS CI acts as an intermediary. Contracts and payments are made directly between the parties.

about.title: About AFTRAS CI
about.subtitle: Your strategic partner for international trade and commercial intermediation.

who_are_we.title: Who are we?
who_are_we.p1: Africa Trading Solutions Côte d'Ivoire SARL (AFTRAS CI) is an international trading company specialized in commercial intermediation and sourcing of high-quality products. Strategically based to serve African and international markets, we act as a reliable bridge between global producers and demanding buyers.
who_are_we.p2: Our expertise is based on deep knowledge of global supply chains and a unique ability to navigate the complexities of international trade. We don't just find products; we build lasting relationships based on trust and performance.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To become a major pan-African player in international trade, recognized for its integrity and operational efficiency.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To facilitate international trade by offering optimized and secure sourcing and logistics solutions.

engagement.title: Our Commitment
engagement.desc: To support our clients at every step to guarantee smooth transactions and concrete results.

services_page.title: Our Expertise Services
services_page.subtitle: Tailor-made solutions to optimize your international trading operations.

items.title: Reliable Supplier Sourcing
items.desc: We identify and audit global suppliers to guarantee the quality and reliability of your supplies.

items.title: Commercial Negotiation
items.desc: Our experts negotiate the best prices, deadlines and payment terms with suppliers for you.

items.title: Commercial Intermediation
items.desc: We act as a trusted third party to secure transactions between buyers and sellers.

items.title: Logistics Organization
items.desc: Complete tracking of the shipment, from pickup to final delivery, including customs formalities.

items.title: Strategic Support
items.desc: Advice on international markets, incoterms and trade regulations.

items.title: Transaction Security
items.desc: Implementation of guarantee mechanisms and verification of document compliance.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.subtitle: How we guarantee the success of your projects.

form.product_placeholder: Ex: Long grain rice, Cashew nuts...
